name: Qingdao Tianneng Heavy Industries Co.,Ltd
summary: Qingdao Tianneng Heavy Industries Co.,Ltd manufactures and supplies wind turbine towers and related equipment. The company offers onshore wind turbines, and offshore wind power towers, as well as photovoltaic power plants. Qingdao Tianneng Heavy Industries Co.,Ltd was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jiaozhou, China.
